issue_summary: BoundedInputStream can count its bytes without wrapping a CountingInputStream
javadoc_before:
/** * Sets the maximum number of bytes to return. *

* Default is {@value IOUtils#EOF}. *

* * @param maxCount The maximum number of bytes to return. * @return this. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Sets the maximum number of bytes to return. *

* Default is {@value IOUtils#EOF}, negative means unbound. *

* * @param maxCount The maximum number of bytes to return. * @return this. */
